title: Object Boardroom
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for photorealistic anthropomorphic objects in executive boardrooms, testing material physics, lighting, and commercial concept staging.

en.title: Object Boardroom
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for photorealistic anthropomorphic objects in executive boardrooms, testing material physics, lighting, and commercial concept staging.

zh-CN.title: 物体拟人化开会
zh-CN.description: 用写实广告级画面表现物体穿西装坐进会议室,测试材质、光照、物理可信度和高概念幽默。
